intro: The clearest split is that Novu has a free tier while Braze does not. Braze is Customer engagement platform with push, in-app messages, email, SMS, WhatsApp, and Canvas journey orchestration; Novu is Open-source notification infrastructure with multi-channel support, in-app feed, user preferences, and self-hostable backend. The data points Braze at mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging, and Novu at mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging. Pricing: Braze is subscription from $10; Novu is freemium, free tier. Lock-in is high for Braze and low for Novu, with DX at 5/5 vs 5/5 and transparency at 1/5 vs 5/5. On listed strengths, Braze emphasises mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging, and Novu emphasises mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging. Both offer an enterprise tier for larger rollouts. Honest trade-off: neither fits web-only products without mobile, so if that is your context, look elsewhere; otherwise pick on the pivotal factor above and the DX score that matters most to your team.
quick_take: Braze is for mobile; Novu is for mobile; decide based on whether a free tier matters.
verdict_a: Choose Braze if starting on a paid subscription upfront is acceptable and your workload matches mobile. Skip it if your context is web-only products without mobile.
verdict_b: Choose Novu if you want to start on a free tier before paying and your workload matches mobile. Skip it if your context is web-only products without mobile.

faq.a: Listed entry pricing is $10 for Braze and $0 for Novu. Novu offers a free tier while Braze does not, so initial cost favors Novu. Total cost at scale depends on usage and plan details that are not in this dataset, so confirm with each vendor.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Braze to Novu?
faq.a: Braze is tagged with high lock-in (engagement platform, deep user data). Novu is tagged with low lock-in (oss notification infrastructure, self-hostable). At least one side is high lock-in, so budget migration time for re-implementing integrations.

faq.q: Which has better developer experience, Braze or Novu?
faq.a: Both are rated 5/5 for developer experience in this dataset. With equal scores, the choice comes down to the specific SDK surface and docs you will use day to day. Run a short spike on each before deciding.

faq.q: Is Novu a good alternative to Braze?
faq.a: Yes for teams whose workload matches mobile, since both list the same fit. Novu is flagged as not for web-only products without mobile, so confirm your context does not fall there. Note that moving from Braze to Novu means gaining access to a free tier.
